topic: Magnesium glycinate vs L-theanine: which actually helps
caption: Did you know 70% of us are deficient in magnesium? 🌟💡 Save this comparison of magnesium glycinate and L-theanine to find out which one actually helps with anxiety and sleep. 🛋️ Magnesium glycinate can increase GABA by 20% and L-theanine can boost alpha brain waves by 30%. 🧠 But what's the difference? 💭 Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💚 #magnesiumglycinate #ltheanine #anxietyrelief #sleepaid #naturalhealth #supplements #mentalhealthmatters #wellness
